title: Aspect Ratio PVP (1.21.10, 1.21.11)
description: Change your aspect ratio for a more enjoyable and effective PvP experience!
body:
(Activation hold B)

With this mod, you can change the aspect ratio. When you change the aspect ratio, the size of the model increases or decreases, and the speed of their movement increases or decreases in proportion.

To activate the aspect ratio change, hold down the B button until the menu opens

The menu has the following aspect ratios:
21:9 | 16:10 | 16:9 | 5:4 | 4:3 | 3:2 | 1:1
